gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie' AND T1.ParentId IS NULL
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE TRIM(T2.DisplayName) = 'csgillespie' AND T1.ParentId IS NULL
question: Among the posts owned by csgillespie, how many of them are root posts?
